elements.text:
You're at a new grocery store and you're looking for bread. Suddenly you notice that your heart is beating quickly and pounding.

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: My heart must be beating faster because I'm walking so quickly up and down the aisles.
Even if this feeling in my chest is really uncomfortable, I know it will go away soon.
I wonder if there's something wrong with my heart, but I can get help and solve the problem if I need to.
I'm going to have a heart attack!
It's amazing how many different food options are at this grocery store.
